notes:
Hybrid SSM re-derive stability + cleaner cache diagnostics:
- Async SSM re-derive broadcast bug fixed (Qwen3.5 auto-chunked prefill was failing with `broadcast_shapes (1,16,2048,64) vs (1,1,1024,64)` on the 2nd chunk). Fresh `make_cache()` output doesn't carry the ArraysCache offset machinery that BatchKVCache wrappers populate, so re-derive now prefers one-shot and skips with INFO when the attention buffer would exceed the Metal single-buffer cap.
- Auto-chunk trigger downgraded from WARNING to INFO with family-aware wording — reads `verified safe on Qwen3.5 GatedDeltaNet` for qwen3_next / qwen3_5 variants, `spot-check output for correctness on non-Qwen3.5 hybrid families` otherwise. VMLX_DISABLE_HYBRID_AUTO_CHUNK=1 still raises the natural OOM on demand.
- Ollama adapter now forwards `reasoning_effort` and `chat_template_kwargs` from the body, so Mistral 4 / GPT-OSS clients targeting the Ollama endpoint keep their effort level end-to-end.
- Test-suite hygiene: stale `/private/tmp/vmlx-1.3.55-build/*` pins across 132 sites updated to the current build path; SSM `is_complete` source pin refreshed to match the post-v1.3.78 branch-per-gpl code.
